design_note: This registry is file-first and append-only/versioned. New memories are added as objects; the mobile panel and matcher do not hardcode them.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: EURUSD — حافظهٔ تضعیف‌شده: upper rejection بعد از up-extension
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: این حافظه قبلاً وارد watch شده بود ولی بعد از holdout ضعیف شد؛ در runtime فعال نمی‌شود مگر دوباره review شود.
allowed_use: registry visibility only
historical caution that this path weakened
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Weakened/parked memory only. Not active, not signal.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: EURUSD — هشدار احتیاطی بعد از sweep ناموفق سطح بالایی
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: اگر EURUSD در London / London-NY overlap / New York یک سطح بالایی مهم را sweep کند ولی کندل M15 بسته‌شده دوباره داخل سطح برگردد، این حافظه نشان می‌دهد که در داده‌های تاریخی رفتار fade-down نسبت به baseline کمی بهتر بوده است. این فقط watch/context است، نه سیگنال فروش.
allowed_use: show as caveated watch/context memory
warn that failed upside sweep has historically had fade-down tendency versus baseline
use as one contextual input in future brain-state summary
use to explain why blind long continuation after failed upside sweep is caveated
historical archive/provenance only
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Archived legacy memory only. Not active in runtime, not signal.
memories.archive_reason: Archived by user decision in SIG-BRAIN-OPS10 to standardize runtime brain on newer MTF directional-watch delivery packs. Evidence retained; hard delete not performed.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: USDJPY — هشدار no-trade / پرهیز از short در chop بدون هم‌راستایی
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: اگر USDJPY در London / London-NY overlap / New York هم‌راستایی واضح H4/H1 نداشته باشد و M15 هم حالت chop / range-neutral داشته باشد، تاریخ discovery و validation diagnostic نشان داده که short-like continuation نسبت به baseline بیشتر به سمت adverse/neutral رفته است. این حافظه فقط هشدار no-trade / avoid-short است، نه سیگنال خرید یا فروش.
allowed_use: show as caveated no-trade / avoid-short watch context
warn that USDJPY short-like continuation is historically weaker in alignment-absent M15 chop
use as a risk-awareness/no-trade filter input in future brain-state summary
help explain why a short-context idea is caveated when alignment is absent and M15 is chop
historical archive/provenance only
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Archived legacy memory only. Not active in runtime, not signal.
memories.archive_reason: Archived by user decision in SIG-BRAIN-OPS10 to standardize runtime brain on newer MTF directional-watch delivery packs. Evidence retained; hard delete not performed.

validity_domain.event_scope: event calendar unavailable; no event/news interpretation
validity_domain.out_of_domain_rule: Out-of-domain is not failure and must not be counted as negative evidence.

required_behavioral_proof_before_activat: sweep_reference_type_up=PRIOR48 must be produced from closed bars only
PRIOR48 high must use prior M15 bars only, not current forming bar
runtime matcher must return MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT if required fields are absent

memories.plain_language_label_fa: USDJPY — هشدار احتیاطی بعد از sweep ناموفق سقف ۴۸ ساعت گذشته در نیویورک
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: اگر USDJPY در جلسهٔ نیویورک سقف ۴۸ ساعت گذشته را sweep کند اما کندل M15 بسته‌شده دوباره داخل سطح برگردد، داده‌های discovery و validation diagnostic یک تمایل caveated به fade-down نسبت به baseline نشان داده‌اند. این فقط watch/context است، نه سیگنال فروش و نه دستور معامله.
memories.discovery_summary: W1 discovery identified the PRIOR48 New York upside sweep rejection fade-down thread as a positive all-horizon thread; W1-P2 selected it as primary.
memories.validation_summary: VAL1-CAV1 showed positive gross delta across H4/H8/H16 with no sample or era caveat, but only as caveated diagnostic validation.
memories.mandatory_caveat: Caveated historical watch context only. Active in runtime display after Brain Ops install review, but not a signal, no buy/sell/hold, no entry/stop/target, no profitability/tradability claim, no broker execution. Holdout 2020-2024 untouched.
rejection_or_parking_conditions: runtime builder cannot produce required fields consistently
future explicitly authorized holdout weakens or rejects the thread
cost/event guard later shows unacceptable fragility
thread is found to be duplicate or disguised version of an existing memory
allowed_use: runtime display-only caveated watch context
historical-memory context card
operator review context only
historical archive/provenance only
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Archived legacy memory only. Not active in runtime, not signal.

runtime_builder_requirements.no_lookahead_rule: reference must be computed only from prior closed M15 bars, excluding evaluated/latest bar
runtime_builder_requirements.insufficient_history_rule: fewer than 96 prior closed M15 bars must return MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT path, not false inactive

context_builder_support_required: Make support registry instrument/timeframe-aware for USDJPY M15 PRIOR48 policy after proof
matcher_requirements: Brain4 must pre-check every required_context_field, not only fields that appear in matching_rule.
If any required_context_field is missing/null/UNKNOWN where not allowed, return MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT.
memories.archive_reason: Archived by user decision in SIG-BRAIN-OPS10 to standardize runtime brain on newer MTF directional-watch delivery packs. Evidence retained; hard delete not performed.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: EURUSD H1 — failed breakout / prior-day low reclaim — لانگ‌-بایاس پژوهشی
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: اگر EURUSD روی H1 در session آسیا، با D1 و H4 نزولی، کف روز قبل را به پایین بشکند اما کندل بسته‌شده دوباره بالای سطح برگردد، این memory یک directional LONG watch پژوهشی نشان می‌دهد. این سیگنال خرید یا دستور معامله نیست.
allowed_use: show as active caveated directional watch when runtime conditions fully match
use as personal research posture/context only
retain evidence and caveats for future setup/trigger pipeline research
memories.mandatory_caveat: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim.
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim.
memories.ops10_integration_note: matching_rule contract was formalized from hypothesis_registry_row and threshold_decision_and_validation_summary because proposed object declared fields but not a complete runtime matching_rule.
memories.if_active_historical_posture_fa: اگر فعال شود، سناریوی تاریخی LONG-like بعد از reclaim کف روز قبل در زمینه D1/H4 نزولی برجسته‌تر می‌شود؛ این فقط context پژوهشی است.

memories.plain_language_summary_fa: در LONDON_NY_OVERLAP، با D1=UP و H4=UP، رویداد LONDON_LOW_SWEEP_REJECT_LONG نسبت به رنج/مرجع session در validation جهت LONG را بهتر از baseline دامنه‌همسان نشان داد. این فقط directional watch است، نه سیگنال معامله.

future_signal_path_metadata.setup_layer_state: session reference range established + D1/H4 regime context present

runtime_builder_requirements: Build session reference ranges using fixed UTC/session policy and closed H1 bars only.
Asian range for London triggers must use 00:00-06:59 UTC completed H1 bars only.
London morning range for NY/overlap triggers must use 07:00-11:59 UTC completed H1 bars only.
Emit MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT if required regime/session reference fields are missing.
No current/incomplete H1, H4, or D1 candle may be used for regime or reference range.
allowed_use: show as active caveated directional watch when runtime conditions fully match
use as personal research posture/context only
retain year-concentration caveat visibly in evidence/diagnostics
memories.mandatory_caveat: Caveated H1 directional watch only. Not a signal and not a trade recommendation.
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Caveated H1 directional watch only. Not a signal and not a trade recommendation.
memories.dependency_caveat: MEDIUM_HIGH correlation risk with adjacent session/reference-range families; do not combine as independent confirmation without separate dependency check.
memories.if_active_historical_posture_fa: اگر فعال شود، سناریوی تاریخی LONG-like بعد از sweep/reject کف London morning در overlap برجسته‌تر می‌شود؛ این فقط context پژوهشی است.
memories.archive_reason: Superseded by stricter London-low sweep/reclaim contract from EURUSD_OVERLAP_LONDON_LOW_SWEEP_RECLAIM_LONG_CAVEATED_WATCH_DELIVERY_PACK_v1_0.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: EURUSD H1 — برگشت از sweep کف لندن در overlap، فقط watch صعودی caveated
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: وقتی EURUSD در D1 و H4 صعودی است، اگر در بازه London-NY overlap کف رنج لندن همان روز sweep شود و کندل H1 دوباره بالای کف لندن بسته شود، در validation 2015-2019 نسبت به baselineهای دامنه‌همسان رفتار صعودی بهتری نشان داده است. این فقط context-watch است، نه سیگنال خرید.
memories.mechanism_fa: جذب نقدینگی فروش زیر کف لندن در زمان تحویل لندن به نیویورک و برگشت داخل رنج در جهت trend بالادستی D1/H4.
memories.if_active_historical_posture_fa: اگر فعال شود، سناریوی تاریخی LONG-like بعد از sweep کف London morning و reclaim در London-NY overlap با D1/H4 صعودی برجسته‌تر می‌شود؛ این فقط context پژوهشی است، نه دستور خرید.

event_rule_spec.trigger_condition: trigger_H1.low <= london_low - buffer AND trigger_H1.close > london_low
event_rule_spec.no_lookahead: London range is built from closed London H1 bars before overlap trigger; validation/holdout separation preserved.

runtime_behavior.display_when: only when closed H1 trigger becomes newly active in latest refresh window
runtime_behavior.proposed_expiry: expire after H1+12 observation horizon or end of UTC day, whichever is earlier; implementation may also keep expired event in history only
runtime_behavior.notification_text_fa: EURUSD: الگوی watch صعودی caveated فعال شد؛ sweep کف لندن و reclaim در overlap با D1/H4 صعودی. سیگنال معامله نیست.

runtime_builder_requirements: Build same-day London 07:00-11:59 UTC H1 range from closed H1 bars only.
Use closed H1 bar low/close for trigger and prior closed H1 ATR20 for buffer.
Use prior-closed/closed D1 and H4 trend context only.
Emit MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT if required runtime fields are unavailable.
No current/incomplete H1, H4, or D1 candle may be used.
allowed_use: show as active caveated directional watch when runtime conditions fully match
use as personal research posture/context only
retain year-concentration caveat visibly in evidence/diagnostics
memories.mandatory_caveat: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim. Caveat: validation max_year_share above 35%.
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim.
memories.dependency_caveat: Supersedes older overlap London-low sweep/reject memory. Do not count both as independent confirmation.
memories.ops17_integration_note: Integrated as stricter replacement for earlier London-low sweep/reject memory after review. Original proposed object was review-only; this patch records repo integration decision while preserving no-signal boundaries.

memories.plain_language_label_fa: EURUSD H1 — London morning low failed downside — لانگ‌بایاس پژوهشی
memories.plain_language_summary_fa: اگر EURUSD روی H1 یک شکست/سویپ ناموفق FAILED_DOWNSIDE روی LONDON_MORNING_LOW در LONDON_NY_OVERLAP نشان دهد و D1/H4 در دامنهٔ ثبت‌شده باشند، در validation رفتار LONG-like نسبت به baseline بهتر بوده است. این فقط watch/context است و سیگنال معامله نیست.
memories.if_active_historical_posture_fa: اگر فعال شود، سناریوی تاریخی LONG-like بعد از failed downside روی کف London morning برجسته‌تر می‌شود؛ این فقط context پژوهشی است، نه دستور خرید.
runtime_builder_requirements: Use closed H1 bars only for London morning low and failed downside reclaim detection.
Use closed H4/D1 bars only for regime context.
Emit MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT if required regime/session reference fields are missing.
allowed_use: show as active caveated directional watch when runtime conditions fully match
use as personal research posture/context only
show in Memory Library tab with simple explanation of historical posture if active
memories.mandatory_caveat: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim.
memories.runtime_display_caveat_required: Caveated H1 directional LONG watch only. Not a buy signal, not an entry instruction, and not a profitability/tradability claim.
memories.dependency_caveat: Potential correlation with adjacent session/reference-range failed-breakout families; do not treat as independent confirmation without dependency review.
memories.ops11_integration_note: Integrated from W16 delivery pack. Runtime contract uses closed H1 London morning low failed downside/reclaim fields added by OPS11. score_not_probability is a conservative display score, not probability.

ops10_policy: Legacy active M15 memories archived by user decision; new runtime-active memories must come from newer MTF directional delivery packs and supported builder fields.

ops11_policy.legacy_memory_policy: three prior active M15 memories remain archived, not hard-deleted
ops11_policy.new_memory: EURUSD H1 targeted London morning low failed downside LONG directional watch integrated
ops11_policy.panel_policy: main tab shows active events only; Memory Library tab shows all registered memories with simple if-active posture text
ops11_policy.authority: display-only personal research posture; not signal

ops17_policy.decision: Supersede older EURUSD H1 London-low sweep/reject memory with stricter London-low sweep/reclaim memory.
